name: James Comer
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $201,003 for James Comer in U.S. House, KY-01. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
